locales.loading_desc: Inaabangan ka namin... Loading game data, please wait.

news.title: Welcome to Batangas City RP!
news.description: Batangas City Roleplay is a Filipino FiveM server set in the heart of Batangas. We offer a rich and immersive experience with custom jobs, scripts, and events. Make sure to read the rules in our Discord before playing!

news.title: Server Rules Updated
news.description: Our server rules have been updated. Failrp, metagaming, and combat logging are strictly enforced. Violations will result in warnings or bans. Stay respectful and enjoy the roleplay experience.

news.title: New Scripts Added
news.description: We recently added new scripts including community service, carry system, and improved vehicle mechanics. Join the server to experience all the latest features!

events.title: Car Meet — Every Saturday
events.description: Join us every Saturday night for the weekly car meet at the car meet location. Show off your rides, win prizes, and have fun with the community!

events.title: Police Chase Event
events.description: Cops vs Criminals — a server-wide chase event hosted by admins. Stay tuned in Discord for the exact date and time!

events.title: Job Fair — Hiring All Factions
events.description: All factions are open for recruitment. Join the police, ambulance, mechanic, or go the illegal route. Visit the Job Center in-game to apply.
